news-global-econ.title: Trump pushed Iran to the brink — but did we win anything that lasts?
news-global-econ.description: Islamabad talks ended without a deal after 21 hours. Robert Maginnis examines why Iran's survival means the strategic competition is far from over.

news-global-econ.title: Prince Harry, Meghan Markle blasted for ‘faux royal tour’ as experts accuse couple of exploiting titles
news-global-econ.description: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's four-day Australia trip draws criticism from royal experts who claim the couple is monetizing their titles and royal relevance.

news-global-econ.title: Alibaba moves onto Tencent’s turf with AI model for 3D video
news-global-econ.description: The new model unveiled Thursday was developed by the Alibaba Token Hub, a newly created business unit, the company said in a post on X. The tool is so far only available on a limited early-access basis, says Alibaba

news-global-econ.title: Trump hits key battlegrounds to sell tax cuts, boost GOP ahead of midterms
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump travels to swing states Nevada and Arizona this week to promote tax cuts passed by congressional Republicans ahead of the midterms.

news-global-econ.title: SEN BERNIE SANDERS: Artificial intelligence is coming for the working class. We must fight back
news-global-econ.description: Legislation sponsored by Sen. Bernie Sanders calls for a federal moratorium on new AI data centers until safeguards protect workers from mass job losses driven by Big Tech oligarchs.

news-global-soc.title: Russian missiles and drones bombard Ukraine in hourslong attack, killing at least 16
news-global-soc.description: Russia launched nearly 700 drones and dozens of missiles at Ukraine, killing at least 16 people and injuring over 80 in its biggest attack in weeks.

news-global-soc.title: Reform Warns Britain is 'Talking Loudly and Carrying a Small Stick', With No Vision, Doctrine or Plan for Defence
news-global-soc.description:
Even as the world wakes up to Britain's chronic "say-do gap" on defence, Westminster is cutting even more cash to boost welfare spending.

news-global-soc.title: Massive Overnight Drone and Missile Strikes Kill at Least 16 in Ukraine
news-global-soc.description:
Russia hammered civilian areas of Ukraine with hundreds of drones and dozens of missiles in an attack that stretched for hours.

news-global-soc.title: Who is Tom Steyer? Anti-ICE billionaire in CA governor’s race faces scrutiny over detention investments
news-global-soc.description: Billionaire Tom Steyer surges to the forefront of California's governor race with a 21% lead, backed by $112 million in personal campaign donations.
